task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile icon or welcome message).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the 'Community Park Vandalism' complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case view is open and the title 'Community Park Vandalism' is clearly visible in the case header or details section.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the process to add a web reference.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, dialog, or form specifically for adding a 'Web Reference', 'External Link', or similar entity is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL field in the web reference form contains exactly 'https://www.justice.gov/foia'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct title and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field contains 'Official DOJ FOIA Guidelines' and the description field contains 'Reference for procedural compliance.' in the web reference form.

task_completion.description: Verify the web reference was successfully saved to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly added web reference is visible in the case's list of references, links, or documents, displaying the entered URL or title.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (like Chromium/Firefox) navigating the ArkCase application, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine ArkCase interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a standard web application UI with ArkCase branding or standard case management layouts, not a text editor or a locally created mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal API shortcuts to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using 'curl', 'wget', or Python scripts in a terminal to directly POST the web reference to the ArkCase backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target system is ArkCase, a web-based case management platform. The target case is 'Community Park Vandalism'. The URL to be added is 'https://www.justice.gov/foia'. Note: Even though the actual real-world webpage title for this URL is 'Office of Information Policy', the task explicitly requires the agent to manually enter 'Official DOJ FOIA Guidelines' as the title and 'Reference for procedural compliance.' as the description. Verify these exact strings are entered in the ArkCase interface forms.
